quote:
The swift rescue of a lone wanderer shows that even the smallest hero can return to the earth after a storm of doubt.

For those who declare victory, the true test is whether the echoes of their triumph reverberate through the silence that follows.

When a nation whispers of a deadly plot, the only truth that survives is that vigilance is the candle that does not burn without flame.

At Easter, a humble call for peace reminds us that the hardest battles are fought within one's own heart, not with swords.

A statue of a rat guarding past wounds proves that courage can burrow beneath the earth and surface to remind us of unseen dangers.

Images of the moon and earth caught by distant rovers carry a lesson: the farther one looks, the further the horizon, but the same star guides all.

In the quiet halls of age, a new deputy is the wind that whispers fresh breath into the old stone.
quote_preview: The swift rescue of a lone wanderer shows that even the smallest hero can return to the earth after a storm of doubt.
